text: {"suggestedLabel":"Eggs Are Healthy Perspective","suggestedDescription":"A viewpoint that emphasizes evidence supporting eggs as a nutritious component of a healthy diet, treating any contrary or irrelevant information as uncertain or irrelevant.","stances":[{"claimIndex":0,"stance":"skip","rationale":""},{"claimIndex":1,"stance":"accept","rationale":"The egg’s shell color has no impact on its nutritional profile, so all eggs can be considered equally healthful."},{"claimIndex":2,"stance":"accept","rationale":"With seven grams of protein and only 80 calories, an extra‑large egg delivers a high protein‑to‑calorie ratio, underscoring its health value."},{"claimIndex":3,"stance":"accept","rationale":"Eggs provide a broad spectrum of essential vitamins and minerals, reinforcing their role as a nutrient‑dense food."},{"claimIndex":4,"stance":"accept","rationale":"Because meeting daily choline needs is difficult, eggs serve as a convenient source to help achieve that requirement."},{"claimIndex":5,"stance":"skip","rationale":""},{"claimIndex":6,"stance":"accept","rationale":"Eggs are explicitly described as a nutritious food suitable for inclusion in a balanced diet."},{"claimIndex":7,"stance":"skip","rationale":""},{"claimIndex":8,"stance":"skip","rationale":""},{"claimIndex":9,"stance":"uncertain","rationale":"While the dietitian promotes plant foods, this does not directly negate the health benefits of eggs, leaving the impact ambiguous."}]}
